title: Council Tax Reduction
jurisdiction: England, Wales and Scotland — but every council runs its own scheme
plainly: Help with council tax, sometimes down to nothing. Real and large — and honestly not computable here, because it is claimed through, and varies by, your council. This entry exists to say so instead of guessing.

verdicts.because: For pension-age households the core rules are nationally prescribed, but the scheme is your council's: the claim, the forms and the local variations all live there. If Pension Credit (Guarantee Credit) applies above, you would usually get the maximum reduction.
verdicts.rule: Local Government Finance Act 1992 s.13A; Council Tax Reduction Schemes (Prescribed Requirements) (England) Regulations 2012 (S.I. 2012/2885)

not_asked: anything — this entry only points you to the right door
not_encoded: everything: each authority's scheme differs, and pretending otherwise would be a guess wearing arithmetic

signpost.text: Find and apply through your council

sources_checked.what: s.13A schemes; pension-age prescribed requirements exist nationally (England)
